ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "situations" (
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each situation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user experiencing the situation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the situation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the situation occurred */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the situation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the situation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the situation occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, meditation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("situation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_situations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pre_experience_reflections" (
  "reflection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pre-experience reflection */,
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the situation associated with the reflection */,
  "reflection_text" TEXT /* Text describing the user's feelings, thoughts, and sensations before the activity */,
  "emotion_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the user's emotional state (1-10) */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* Description of the user's physical state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reflection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pre_experience_reflections_situation_id FOREIGN KEY ("situation_id") REFERENCES situations ("situation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "during_experience_reflections" (
  "reflection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each during-experience reflection */,
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the situation associated with the reflection */,
  "reflection_text" TEXT /* Text describing the user's feelings, thoughts, and sensations during the activity */,
  "emotion_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the user's emotional state (1-10) */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* Description of the user's physical state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reflection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_during_experience_reflections_situation_id FOREIGN KEY ("situation_id") REFERENCES situations ("situation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_experience_reflections" (
  "reflection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-experience reflection */,
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the situation associated with the reflection */,
  "reflection_text" TEXT /* Text describing the user's feelings, thoughts, and sensations after the activity */,
  "emotion_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the user's emotional state (1-10) */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* Description of the user's physical state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reflection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_experience_reflections_situation_id FOREIGN KEY ("situation_id") REFERENCES situations ("situation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lessons_learned" (
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson learned */,
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the situation associated with the lesson */,
  "lesson_text" TEXT /* Text describing what the user learned from the experience */,
  "lesson_tag" TEXT /* Category of the lesson (e.g., stress management, gratitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lessons_learned_situation_id FOREIGN KEY ("situation_id") REFERENCES situations ("situation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_text" TEXT /* Text describing the mindfulness goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text describing the recommendation */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was given */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., activity, resource) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., AI, coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress tracking entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making progress */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the user is working towards */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was noted */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the user's progress */,
  "progress_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the user's progress (1-10) */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Rating of the user's confidence in achieving the goal (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
